item.title: 被 Power Automate 入侵，以及如何避免它 | Hacked by Power Automate, and How to Avoid it
item.description:
单击诱饵警报，我实际上并没有被 Power Automate 攻击，但是 Power Automate 开发人员可能会遇到很大的安全风险。

安全问题全都围绕 Power Platform 如何处理凭据，每个用户/所有者登录并将其凭据存储在连接中。

这有它的优势，因为所有凭据都被安全存储，并且访问应用程序/运行流程很容易，因为 Power Platform 可以处理所有事情。 当您共享流程时就会出现问题，因为您可能没有意识到您正在与该用户共享您的连接（也称为凭据）。

他们可能看不到您的凭据，但这并不意味着他们不能以您不希望的方式使用它们。 更糟糕的是，连接没有粒度，因此用于阅读事件的 Outlook 连接可用于删除电子邮件。

好消息是 Microsoft 最近开始在您共享连接时发出警告。

虽然我认为微软在未来会做更多，但目前它的说明已经足够了，因为：

  • 如果您不阅读这些警告（人们不会阅读这些警告，尤其是当它看起来更像是条款和条件然后是警告时）
  • 遗留股份
  • 没有简单的选择（需要服务帐户，公民开发人员通常不容易访问）

在我们可以避免它之前，我们需要知道如何，所以如果我共享一个流，我究竟是如何被黑客攻击的。

首先要说的是，如果您共享 Outlook 连接，则黑客攻击的可能性更大，这是因为所有者只会通过电子邮件收到更改通知。 虽然这并不能降低所有风险，因为取决于何时进行更改，所有者可能没有机会看到更改（没有版本控制，并且运行日志记录仅限于最后 100 次运行）。

让我们从一个简单的流程开始，该流程在电子邮件上触发到共享邮箱，它对电子邮件执行一些操作并结束。

这听起来像是一个流的例子，它可以作为共享邮箱共享，因此团队很可能会依赖它。

一旦我拥有共享所有者权限，我就可以查看和使用所有者连接，因此如果我愿意，我可以删除共享邮箱触发器并使用到达的个人电子邮件。

但为什么我要将触发器更改为新电子邮件到达时 (V3)，那是因为所有者收到更改的唯一警告是一封电子邮件。 因此，如果我们将触发器更改为所有者邮箱，我们就可以拦截该电子邮件，将其删除并将其用作我们想要执行的其他操作的触发器。

因此，我们需要做的就是添加主题条件（包含“{Your name} has changed a shared flow”），删除电子邮件，然后我们可以对所有者 Outlook 连接做任何我们喜欢的事情。

在这个例子中，我可能正在阅读你最近的 10 封电子邮件，或者向任何暗示你/你的批准的人发送电子邮件。

如果我聪明的话，我会在终止后保存所有的组织流，这样我就可以轻松地恢复到组织流。

您需要处理一些事情，例如：

  • 确保所有者在被删除之前没有看到更改电子邮件（确保不在办公室），
  • 解释最后通过的更改电子邮件（即对注释进行简单更改）
  • 清除日志（发送 100 封测试邮件）

等等，但稍加思考就可以克服它们。

那么我们如何保护自己，避免被黑客入侵：

使用发送副本或可以作为仅运行用户共享的流程（因为这需要他们的凭据）

  • 使用服务帐户

    • 例如，当您可以使用已经是流程一部分的 Outlook 连接器时，将团队连接添加为异常处理程序

    只要它是服务器端规则，它就会在流程有机会删除它之前运行，这样，如果您只在副本文件夹中找到一封电子邮件，您就知道这是一个标志，有人在做坏事。



    原文:

    Click bait alert, I wasnt actually hacked by Power Automate, but there is a big security risk that Power Automate Developers could fall fowl of.

    The security issue is all around how the Power Platform handles credentials, with each user/owner signing in and storing their credentials in connections.

    This has its strengths, as all credentials are securely stored and accessing apps/ running flows is easy as the Power Platform handles everything. The problem comes when you share flows, as what you might not realise is you are sharing your connections (aka credentials) with that user.

    They may not be able to see your credentials, but that doesnt mean they cant use them in a way that you didnt want. And whats worse is there is no granularity in connections, so an Outlook connection used for reading events can be used to delete emails.

    The good news is Microsoft recently started to warn you when you shared connections.

    And although I see Microsoft doing more in the future, for now its note quite enough, because:

    • If you dont read these warnings (which people don't especially when it looks like more Terms & Conditions then warnings)
    • Legacy shares
    • No easy alternatives (Requires Service Accounts, often not easily accessible for citizen developers)

    Before we can avoid it we need to know how, so exactly how could I get hacked if I share a flow.

    The first thing to say is the hack is a lot more likely if you share Outlook connection, and this is because the owner only gets notified of changes through email. Though this does not mitigate all risk as depending on when the changes are made the owner might not get chance to see the changes (there is no version control and run logging is limited to last 100 runs).

    Lets start with a simple flow that is triggered on a email to shared mailbox, it does something with the email and ends.

    This sounds like an example of a flow that would be shared as its a shared mailbox so a team most likely relies on it.

    Once I have shared owner rights I can see and use the owners connections, so if I wanted to I could delete the Shared Mailbox trigger and use the personal email arrives.

    But why would I change the trigger to When a new email arrives (V3), well thats because the only warning the owner gets of changes is an email. So if we changed the trigger to the owners mailbox, we can intecept that email, delete it and use it as a trigger for other actions we want to do.

    So all we would need to do is add a subject condition (contains "{Your name} has changed a shared flow" ), delete the email and we can then do anything we like with the owners Outlook connections.

    In this example I could be reading all your recent 10 emails or send an email to anyone impersinating you/your approval.

    If Im smart I would save all the orgional flow behind a terminate so that I can easily revert back to the orgional flow.

    There are a few things you would have to deal with e.g:

    • Ensuring the owner didnt see the change email before being deleted (make sure out of office),
    • Explain the last change email that gets through (ie make a simple change to a note)
    • Clear the logs (send 100 test emails)

    and more, but they can be overcome with a little thought.

    So how do we protect ourselves and avoid being hacked:

    1 Dont share flows unless you really have to.

    • Use send a copy or a flow that can be shared as a run only user (as that requires their credentials)
    • Use Service Accounts

    2 Minmalise Connections, so don't include additional unecessary connections in any flow you make

    • e.g Add a teams connection as a exception handler when you could use Outlook connectors that is already part of the flow

    3 Set an Outlook rule to copy Flow change emails to another folder. As long as its a server side rule it will run before the flow gets chance to delete it, this way if you ever find an email only in the copy folder you know thats a flag someone is upto no good.
item.author: wyattdave

item.title: 如何使用 Visual Studio 2022 和 Microsoft SQL Server 2022 创建简单的学生管理软件 | How to create a simple Student Management Software with Visual Studio 2022 and Microsoft SQL Server 2022
item.description:
提摩太

发表于 3 月 22 日

本指南用于演示如何使用Visual Studio 2022和Microsoft SQL Server 2022创建新的 Windows 窗体应用程序，让您管理存储在 Microsoft SQL Server 数据库环境中的学生记录。

  1. 第一步是确保您拥有 Visual Studio 软件开发工具，您可以从 Microsoft Visual Studio 官方网站下载专业版或社区版。

  2. 第二步是确保你安装了Microsoft SQL Server 2022 ，你可以从 Microsoft SQL Server 官方网站下载它。 选择开发者版并点击下载选项。 下载完成后运行安装程序，您应该会看到下面的窗口。


在出现的下一个窗口中选择基本并接受条款和条件，该窗口应类似于下面的窗口。


接受条款和条件后，系统将提示您在下一个屏幕中确认要安装程序的位置。


指定要安装 Microsoft SQL Server 的位置后，您将在下一个屏幕中看到安装过程的进度条，等待安装完成。

在上面的屏幕中，您可以看到标记为连接字符串的文本框，单击它旁边的剪贴板图标以复制连接字符串并使用记事本或任何其他相关文本编辑工具将其保存到文本文件中。
通过单击屏幕底部标有“关闭”的按钮关闭 SQL Server 2022 安装程序窗口。

如何在 Visual Studio 2022 中创建新项目

启动 Visual Studio 2022，您应该会看到类似于下面屏幕截图的 Visual Studio 屏幕启动器。


然后将显示带有创建新项目或打开现有项目选项的窗口


从上面的窗口中单击创建新项目和
您应该会看到一个带有组合框选项的窗口，用于指定项目所针对的编程语言、操作系统和平台。 该窗口应该类似于下面的屏幕截图。


从上面的窗口中单击Programming Language组合框并选择C#然后单击下一个组合框以选择Windows作为目标操作系统，最后单击最后一个组合框并将目标平台设置为Desktop 。 您将看到模板列表动态更新自身以列出所有符合您在上面指定的条件的模板。 将列出几个模板，例如Windows 窗体应用程序、WPF 应用程序、WPF 类库、WPF 用户控件库、WPF 自定义控件库等，类似于下面显示的输出。


单击上方屏幕上的Windows 窗体应用程序模板，然后单击下一步以查看让您指定项目名称和要保存项目的位置的窗口。


在上面的窗口中，根据需要键入项目的名称（必填），您也可以（可选）选择要保存项目的位置。 单击“下一步”打开窗口，您可以在该窗口中选择要使用的.NET Framework 。


在上面的窗口中，您可以选择.NET 6.0（长期支持）或.NET 7.0（标准期限支持） ，单击“创建”以在 Visual Studio 2022 中加载新项目。

使用设计器添加用户界面控件

项目成功创建并加载到 Visual Studio 2022 后，您应该会看到设计器在 Visual Studio 中作为选项卡打开。 设计器窗口看起来类似于下面显示的输出。


在上面的窗口中，您可以单击“查看”->“工具箱”或简单地键入键盘快捷键Ctrl + Alt + X以显示工具箱，该工具箱对于添加文本框元素很有用，这些元素将帮助我们从使用应用。 按上面的键盘快捷键后，您应该会看到显示的工具箱，类似于下面显示的输出。


您还可以通过在工具箱顶部的搜索框中键入来搜索控件，如下面的屏幕截图所示。 我已经搜索了控件标签

单击工具箱中的标签控件并将光标移回窗体设计器，光标应该看起来像十字线。 单击窗体，控件应在窗体上生成，如下面的屏幕截图所示。


单击上面的 Label 控件并右键单击它以显示类似于下面的屏幕截图输出的上下文菜单。


单击“属性”以显示类似于下面所附屏幕截图的标签的“属性”窗口。


从上面突出显示的Properties窗口中找到 Label 控件的Text 属性，并将其值更改为Student First Name 。 更改属性后按键盘上的Enter 键，它应该类似于下面显示的输出。


点击键盘快捷键Ctr + Alt + X以显示工具箱，在搜索栏中键入文本框并单击文本框控件将其复制，然后将光标移回表单设计器并单击我们创建的第一个标签下方的区域，它应该会自动生成文本框，如下面的输出所示。


您始终可以通过垂直或水平拖动 for 的边缘来分别增加宽度和高度来调整 Form 的大小。 为此，请单击表格边缘的小白框并向右、向左或向下拖动它们以增加表格的大小。 有关在设计器上定位这些方块的详细信息，请参阅随附的屏幕截图。


拖动方块以增加表单的大小后，您应该会看到类似于下面屏幕截图的输出。

对“学生姓氏”、“学生电子邮件”、“学生电话”、“学生地址”、“学生城市”和“学生国籍”字段重复相同的过程，以获得类似于以下屏幕截图的界面。


通过键盘快捷键Ctrl + Alt + X重新打开工具箱并搜索Button控件并将其拖动到窗体以具有如下所示的应用程序界面。


单击刚刚添加的Button控件以显示该按钮的属性，找到Text 属性并将其更改为Register Student ，请参见下面的屏幕截图了解更多详细信息。

您会注意到，当您从属性窗口更新按钮的文本属性时，表单中按钮内的文本也会发生变化。

按Ctrl + S保存所做的所有更改


在表单顶部添加一个菜单条，其中包含用于从数据库中编辑、检索和删除学生信息的命令。 要将菜单条添加到表单，请点击键盘快捷键 ( Ctrl + Alt + X ) 以显示工具箱，然后在搜索栏中键入MenuStrip ，单击它并将其拖到设计器中。 您也可以只单击它然后释放鼠标按钮，然后将光标移动到设计器并单击设计器上的空白区域，菜单条将在表单上自动生成。


单击上面的控件，释放鼠标并再次单击设计器以在窗体上生成控件。 您应该会看到类似下面屏幕截图中的输出。


单击标有黄色箭头的窗口底部的menuStrip1项，您应该会在表单顶部看到一个空文本框，您需要在其中键入菜单条第一项的名称，然后键入文本检索您应该看到与下面的屏幕截图匹配的输出。


单击我们刚刚在其中键入文本 Retrieve 的文本框旁边的文本框，然后键入文本Edit ，这样界面就会更新为如下面的屏幕截图所示。


然后单击Edit菜单条旁边的Textbox并添加第三个名为Delete的菜单条项。 添加第三个菜单条后，应用程序的界面应更新为如下面的屏幕截图所示。


按键盘上的Ctrl + S保存更改。

配置 MySQL Server 2022 并将其连接到 Windows Forms 应用程序

由于我们的应用程序需要从数据库服务器读取和写入这些学生的数据，因此我们必须在该数据库中创建一个名为College 的数据库和一个名为Students的表，该表将存储通过Windows 窗体应用程序。

为了做到这一点，我们需要虔诚地遵循以下步骤：

打开命令提示符并键入以下命令以远程连接到 SQL Server 2022。

如果上述命令成功，那么您应该会看到命令行终端上的路径被文本>1替换，如下面的屏幕截图所示。

连接到数据库服务器后，您需要运行命令以使用以下语法创建一个名为College的新数据库。

 CREATE DATABASE College GO

如果命令成功，您将看到类似于下面的屏幕截图。


使用以下语法在同一大学数据库中创建一个名为Students的新表，其中包含student_id、student_fname、student_lname、student_phone、student_address、student_city 和 student_nationality列。

 USE College; CREATE TABLE Student ( student_id INT IDENTITY(1,1) PRIMARY KEY, first_name VARCHAR(50), last_name VARCHAR(50), phone VARCHAR(20), address VARCHAR(100), city VARCHAR(50), nationality VARCHAR(50) );

成功运行上述命令后，终端将显示一个新行供您输入下一个命令，如下面的屏幕截图所示。

现在回到窗体设计器并双击窗体和窗体上没有控件的部分，例如，您可以双击带有红点的部分，如下面的屏幕截图所示。


单击上面屏幕截图中显示的红点后，IDE 将自动生成一个方法，在加载表单时调用该方法。 方法签名采用下面屏幕截图中名为 **** 的方法。


在该方法中，我们将编写连接到 SQL Server 数据库并在连接成功时显示消息框警报的C#源代码。
打开保存连接字符串的文本文件，然后单击Ctrl + C复制连接字符串。 如果您没有将连接字符串保存到文本文件中，那么您可以从下面的屏幕截图中复制它。


复制上面的连接字符串，然后双击窗体打开窗体的OnLoad事件处理程序的方法处理程序，迁移到类的顶部并添加一个名为connectionString的定义，如下面的屏幕截图所示。


向下滚动并将光标置于具有签名private void Form1_Load(object sender, EventArgs e){} 的方法内，并将以下代码放入其中。

 try { using (SqlConnection connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString)) { connection.Open(); MessageBox.Show("Connection successful!", "Success", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information); } } catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show("Connection failed. Error message: " + ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }

粘贴代码后，您应该会看到类似于下面屏幕截图的输出，其中类型SqlConnection显示编译时错误。


要消除上述错误，请按键盘快捷键Ctrl + Enter ，您应该会看到一个名为Install Package System.Data.SqlClient的选项，它与下面的屏幕截图相对应。


从上面的屏幕截图中，选择Install Package System.Data.Client然后选择Find and Install The Latest version
它应该找到System.Data.SqlClient并将其安装到项目中。 这将消除错误，以便表单中代码的最终状态如下面的屏幕截图所示。

调试程序

为了让我们测试程序是否按预期工作，我们需要使用调试按钮来运行程序。 您始终可以在窗口顶部找到“调试”选项，它是一个指向右侧的绿色旋转三角形，它在下面的屏幕截图中突出显示。


单击上面屏幕中的两个绿色三角形之一来运行该程序，您应该会得到类似于下面屏幕截图的输出，其中成功连接到 SQL Server 数据库。


上面屏幕截图中的信息显示该程序现在已成功连接到 SQL Server。
单击上面对话框中消息对话框上的确定以清除它，以便表单应用程序显示如下面的屏幕截图。


关闭窗体并单击解决方案资源管理器中的Form1.cs文件，右键单击它并选择视图设计器。 该步骤在下面的屏幕截图中清楚地突出显示。


在 Designer 上双击Register Student按钮，处理此按钮的Click 事件的代码应生成类似于下面屏幕截图的输出。

验证表单上的用户输入

由于该程序需要填写程序中的文本框字段，因此我们需要按钮事件处理程序中的逻辑来检查用户是否尝试提交空字段并提示他/她输入正确的值。 例如，Student First Name 字段有一些规则，例如Name should not be less than three characters, Name should not contain Numbers or Special Characters, Name should not be empty 。 为实现这一点，我们将文本框引用为textbox1 ，我们将 C# 代码添加到按钮处理程序中，以确保满足这些条件。 示例代码如下所示。

 string input = textBox1.Text; if (input. Length < 3) { MessageBox.Show("The text must be at least 3 characters long.", "Invalid Input", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning); return; } else if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(input)) { MessageBox.Show("The text cannot be empty.", "Invalid Input", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning); return; } else if (Regex.IsMatch(input, @"[^a-zA-Z0-9 ]")) { MessageBox.Show("The text contains special characters.", "Invalid Input", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning); return; }

在button_1_Click事件中粘贴上面的代码后，我的代码看起来像下面的屏幕截图。

更新代码后，单击绿色运行按钮运行程序，当您尝试单击注册学生按钮时，学生名字的文本框为空，程序会显示错误供用户更正。 示例输出显示在下面的屏幕截图中。


您可以通过更改上述代码的引用以包含textBox1、textBox2等来为其他文本框元素定义验证规则。 我们现在要将我们的第一个学生记录插入数据库，为此我们将编写一个方法，将表单的输入作为参数，并对数据库运行查询，如果操作成功则返回 true，否则返回如果有问题或异常则为 false。 方法代码在下面突出显示。

 public bool InsertStudentRecord(string firstName, string lastName, string phone, string address, string city, string nationality) { string query = "INSERT INTO Student (first_name, last_name, phone, address, city, nationality) VALUES (@studentId, @firstName, @lastName, @phone, @address, @city, @nationality);"; try { using (SqlConnection connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString)) { connection.Open(); SqlCommand command = new SqlCommand(query, connection); command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@firstName", firstName); command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@lastName", lastName); command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@phone", phone); command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@address", address); command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@city", city); command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@nationality", nationality); int result = command.ExecuteNonQuery(); if (result > 0) { return true; } else { return false; } } } catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message); return false; } }

打开Form1.cs文件并将上面的方法粘贴到其中，这样代码文件就会更新为类似于下面的屏幕截图。

滚动到处理我们的注册学生按钮事件的方法，并使用我们在类似于下面突出显示的代码的条件结构中粘贴上面的方法

private void button1_Click_1(object sender, EventArgs e) { string input = textBox1.Text; if (input.Length < 3) { MessageBox.Show("The text must be at least 3 characters long.", "Invalid Input", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning); return; } else if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(input)) { MessageBox.Show("The text cannot be empty.", "Invalid Input", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning); return; } else if (Regex.IsMatch(input, @"[^a-zA-Z0-9 ]")) { MessageBox.Show("The text contains special characters.", "Invalid Input", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning); return; } //Validation for other Input fields //if everything works as expected then get student details //get the first name of the student var fname = textBox1.Text; //get the last name of the student var lname = textBox2.Text; //get the contact of the student var phone = textBox3.Text; //get the address of the student var address = textBox4.Text; //get the city of the student var city = textBox5.Text; //get the nationality of the student var nation = textBox6.Text; if (InsertStudentRecord(fname, lname, phone, address, city, nation)) { MessageBox.Show("Student record inserted successfully into the database"); } else { MessageBox.Show("Insert operation failed, check exception for details"); } }

运行程序并确保填写所有字段，然后单击“注册学生”按钮。
如果您已正确完成所有操作，那么该程序应该会成功，并且会显示一个警告，表明学生信息已成功插入数据库。 有关更多详细信息，请参见下面的屏幕截图。


现在打开设计器以查看 Menu Strip 项Retrieve、Edit 和 Delete 。 打开的设计器将采取下面的截图。 双击标记为Retrieve的 Menu Strip 项目，该项目由橙色箭头指向。


双击Retrieve menu strip 项后，IDE 将生成一个方法，使我们能够为该特定菜单条编写Click事件。 我们需要对这个菜单条项目进行编程，以接受来自用户的学生 ID，并从数据库中返回有关该学生的数据列表。 该方法的生成和显示方式与下面的屏幕截图类似。


我们需要从用户那里捕获student_id信息，以便我们可以使用它从数据库中检索有关具有该student_id 的学生的所有信息，我们将显示一个输入对话框，提示用户使用下面的代码输入学生 ID。 将下面的代码粘贴到上面屏幕截图中显示的方法中。

 var studentID = Microsoft.VisualBasic.Interaction.InputBox("Please enter your student ID:", "Enter Student ID"); //check if the user did not enter anything or a non number literal var empty = studentID == string.Empty; if (empty) { //user did not enter student ID, show a message box explainging why MessageBox.Show("The student ID is required to be able to retrieve information about that student"); //do not execute further code return; } else { //check if the user did enter something but a non integer literal if(Int32.TryParse(studentID, out int result)) { //user entered the correct input //get the integer and query for all the information for that student from database } else { //user entered a an incorrect input MessageBox.Show("You entered an incorrect integer literal"); return; } }

将上述代码粘贴到retrieveToolStripMenuItem_Click方法中后，系统会提示用户在单击该项目时输入学生 ID。

我们将编写另一个方法，该方法采用整数参数作为学生 ID，查询数据库以获取有关该学生的所有信息并返回有关该学生的数据列表。 方法签名显示在下面的屏幕截图中。

 public List<string> GetStudentData(string studentId) { // Set up a connection to your database SqlConnection connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString); // Create a SQL query that selects all columns from a table called "students" // where the "id" column matches the specified studentId. string query = "SELECT * FROM student WHERE studet_id = @studentId"; SqlCommand command = new SqlCommand(query, connection); command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@studentId", studentId); // Open the connection to the database and execute the query. connection.Open(); SqlDataReader reader = command.ExecuteReader(); // Read the data returned by the query and add each column's value to a list of strings. List<string> studentData = new List<string>(); while (reader.Read()) { studentData.Add(reader["id"].ToString()); studentData.Add(reader["name"].ToString()); studentData.Add(reader["age"].ToString()); studentData.Add(reader["major"].ToString()); // Add more columns here as needed. } // Close the reader and the connection to the database. reader.Close(); connection.Close(); // Return a tuple containing the student data list and the count of the list. return studentData; }

将代码粘贴到您的Form1.cs文件中，使其嵌套在类中，如下面的屏幕截图所示。

将代码粘贴到您的类中后，将您的retrieveToolStripMenuItem_Click处理程序更新为如下所示。

 private void retrieveToolStripMenuItem_Click(object sender, EventArgs e) { var studentID = Microsoft.VisualBasic.Interaction.InputBox("Please enter your student ID:", "Enter Student ID"); //check if the user did not enter anything or a non number literal var empty = studentID == string.Empty; if (empty) { //user did not enter student ID, show a message box explainging why MessageBox.Show("The student ID is required to be able to retrieve information about that student"); //do not execute further code return; } else { //check if the user did enter something but a non integer literal if(Int32.TryParse(studentID, out int result)) { //user entered the correct input //get the integer and query for all the information for that student from database\ var data = GetStudentData(studentID); if (data.Count == 0) { //no student was found with that ID MessageBox.Show("No student with such ID exists in the database"); return; } if(data.Count >0) { //build a student info string var info = "Names: " + data[0] + " " + data[1] + "\n" + "Phone: " + data[2] + "\n" + "Address: " + data[3] + "\n" + "City: " + data[4] + "\n" + "\n" + "Nationality: " + data[5]; MessageBox.Show(info,"Student Found"); } } else { //user entered a an incorrect input MessageBox.Show("You entered an incorrect integer literal"); return; } } }

运行该程序，单击Retrieve并将1作为 studentID 参数传递，然后单击OK以查看有关具有该 ID 的学生的信息。


如果您将学生记录插入数据库，那么此操作应该会成功，并且您应该会看到一个包含学生信息的消息框，类似于下面的屏幕截图。


通过单击文件Form1.cs[Design]*打开设计器。 双击上面的菜单条后，您应该能够看到 IDE 生成的一个方法，用于处理编辑菜单条项上的单击事件。 方法应该类似于下面的截图。

我们将在该方法中放置代码，该方法也需要用户提供学生 ID 参数，然后显示输入对话框，其中包含用户打算编辑的该记录的每个属性的标题。 该代码在下面的代码部分中突出显示。

 //display an input dialog for the student ID the user would like to edit var studentID = Microsoft.VisualBasic.Interaction.InputBox("Please enter the student ID you want to edit:", "Enter Student ID"); //cegck if the input is empty var empty = studentID == string.Empty; if (empty) { MessageBox.Show("You have to enter the ID of the student you would like to edit", "Student ID error"); //do not execute further code return; } else { //if not empty try and parse an integer literal out of the string if(Int32.TryParse(studentID,out var b)) { //integer parsed legal //check if such a record exists in the database //if true show the input dialog to capture the new values for the student object } else { //integer parsed is illegal MessageBox.Show("The integer literal you entered is invalid"); } }

将上面的代码粘贴到Form1.cs文件的editToolStripMenuItem_Click方法中。 之后，我们需要定义一个布尔方法，该方法将检查数据库表中是否存在具有指定用于编辑目的的学生 ID 的行，如果找到记录，我们将显示一个消息框，如果找到，则显示字段供用户编辑记录找到记录。 代码部分如下所示。

 public bool CheckIfRecordExists(string studentId) { bool recordExists = false; using (SqlConnection connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString)) { string query = "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Student WHERE student_id = @studentId"; SqlCommand command = new SqlCommand(query, connection); command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@studentId", studentId); connection.Open(); int count = (int)command.ExecuteScalar(); if (count > 0) { recordExists = true; } else { } } return recordExists; }

将上面的代码粘贴到Form1.cs文件的方法级别。 粘贴上面的方法后，您应该会看到文件已更新为类似于下面的输出。

在editToolStripMenuItem_Click方法中使用上述方法并检查是否存在与该学生 ID 关联的现有数据库表条目。 这是显示如何使用该方法检查记录的屏幕截图。


运行程序，找到编辑菜单条命令并单击它，系统会立即提示您通过输入对话框消息框输入学生 ID 参数，如下面的屏幕截图所示。


传递一个示例学生 ID参数，在本例中我传递了参数1并单击了OK 。 您将看到一个提示，要求您使用刚刚通过的 ID 编辑学生的名字。
我将键入姓名Williams以更新学生 ID 为 1的记录的名字，然后单击确定并等待程序显示更新操作成功的消息。 下面的屏幕截图显示了我输入的用于更新带有学生 ID 参数1的条目的名字的值。

一旦暂停，timcsharp 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

解除暂停后，timcsharp 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，timcsharp 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 timcsharp 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是您可以用来标记 timcsharp 的操作：

使 timcsharp 的所有帖子不那么显眼

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 timcsharp 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Timothytnk

Posted on Mar 22

This guide is for demonstrating how to use Visual Studio 2022 and Microsoft SQL Server 2022 to create a new Windows Forms Application that let's you manage student records stored in a Microsoft SQL Server database environment.

  1. The first step is to make sure you have Visual Studio Software development tool, you can download either the Professional or Community versions from the official Microsoft Visual Studio website.

  2. The second step is to make sure you have Microsoft SQL Server 2022 installed and you can download it from the official Microsoft SQL Server website. Choose the Developer edition and hit the download option. Run the installer once the download is complete and you should see the window below.


Choose basic and accept the Terms and Conditions in the next window that shows up which should be similar to the window below.


After you have accepted the terms and conditions you will be prompted to confirm the location you would like to install the program in the next screen.


After you have specified the location where you would like Microsoft SQL Server to be installed then you will see a progress bar for the installation process in the next screen, wait for the installation to finish.

After Microsoft SQL Server has finished installing then you will see the Setup Successful screen with very important information you can use for establishing a connection to the database from the Windows Forms application.


In the above screen you can see the Text Box labeled as Connection String click on the clipboard icon next to it to copy the connection string and save it to a text file using Notepad or any other relevant text editing tool.
Close the SQL Server 2022 installer window by clicking the button labeled Close at the bottom of the screen.

How to create a new Project in Visual Studio 2022

Launch Visual Studio 2022 and you should see the Visual Studio screen launcher which looks similar to the screenshot below.


Then the Window with the options to either Create New project or Open an existing Project will show up


From the above window click on Create New Project and
you should see a window with Combo box options to specify the Programing Language , Operating System and the Platform the project is targeting. The window should look like similar to the screenshot attached below.


From the above window click on the Programming Language Combo box and select C# then click on the next Combo box to choose Windows as the Operating System targeted and finally click on the last Combo box and set the platform targeted to be Desktop. You will see the templates list dynamically updating itself to list all those templates that fit the criteria you specified above. Several templates such as Windows Forms App, WPF App, WPF Class Library, WPF User Control Library, WPF Custom Control Library et cetera will be listed similar to the output shown below.


Click on the Windows Forms App template on the screen above and then click on Next to view the Window that let's you specify the Name of the Project and the Location you would like to save the project.


From the window above type the Name (mandatory) of the project as you please and you can also(optional) choose where you would like to save the project. Click on Next to bring up the Window that should let you choose the .NET Framework you would like to work with.


While in the Window above you can either choose .NET 6.0(Long Term Support) or .NET 7.0(Standard Term Support), click on Create to load the new Project in Visual Studio 2022.

Using the Designer to add User Interface Controls

After the project is successfully created and loaded into Visual Studio 2022 then you should see the Designer open as a tab in Visual Studio. The designer window looks similar to the output shown below.


While in the above Window you can click on View->Toolbox or simply type the keyboard shortcut Ctrl + Alt + X to show the Toolbox that will be useful for adding Text Box elements that will help us in capturing student information from a user using the application. After pressing the keyboard shortcut above then you should see the Toolbox exposed similar to the output shown below.


You can also search for a control by typing in the search box at the top of the Toolbox like in the screenshot attached below. I have searched for the control Label

Click on a Label control from the Toolbox and move the cursor back to the form designer, the cursor should look like a cross hair. Click on the Form and the control should be generated on the form like in the screenshot below.


Click on the Label control above and right click on it to show a context menu similar to the screenshot output below.


Click on Properties to show the Properties Window of the Label similar to the screenshot attached below.


Locate the Text property of the Label control from the Properties window highlighted above and change its value to be Student First Name. After changing the property hit Enter on the keyboard, it should be similar to the output shown below.


Hit the keyboard shortcut Ctr + Alt + X to show the Toolbox, type Textbox in the search bar and click on the TextBox Control to copy it and then move the cursor back to the form designer and click on the area below the first label we created, it should automatically generate the Textbox like shown in the output shown below.


The Textbox is generated below the first label, You can drag it and place it to the right of our Label so that the design is similar to the output below.


You can always resize the Form by dragging the edges of the for either vertically or horizontally to increase the width and height respectively. To do this click on the little white boxes on the edges of the Form and drag them right, left or down to increase the size of the form. See attached screenshot for details on locating those squares on the designer.


After dragging the squares to increase the size of the form you should see an output similar to the screenshot below.

Repeat the same procedure for the Fields Student Last Name, Student Email, Student Phone, Student Address, Student City and Student Nationality to have an interface that looks something similar to the screenshot shown below.


Reopen the Toolbox via the keyboard shortcut Ctrl + Alt + X and search for a Button control and Drag it to the Form to have an interface for the application that looks like below.


Click on the Button control you just added to show the Properties of that Button, find the Text Property and change it to be Register Student, see the screenshot below for more details.

You will notice that when you update the Text property of the button from the Properties window then the text inside the Button in the Form also changes.

Save all the changes made by hitting Ctrl + S


Add a Menu Strip to the top of the Form which will contain the commands to Edit, Retrieve and Delete Student information from the database. To add a Menu Strip to the form hit the keyboard shortcut (Ctrl + Alt + X) to show the Toolbox and then type MenuStrip in the search bar, click on it and drag it to the designer. You can also just click it then release the mouse button then move the cursor to the designer and click on an empty area on the designer and the menu strip will be autogenerated on the form.


Click on the above control, release the mouse and once again click on the designer to generate the control on the form. You should expect to see an output like the one in the screenshot below.


Click on the menuStrip1 item at the bottom of the window labeled with the yellow arrow and you should see an empty textbox at the top of the form where you will need to type the name of the first item of the Menu Strip, after typing the text Retrieve you should see an output that matches the screenshot below.


Click on the Textbox next to the one we just typed the text Retrieve in and type the text Edit so the interface is updated to look like the screenshot below.


Then click on the Textbox next to the Edit menu strip and add a third menu strip item called Delete. After adding the third menu strip the interface of the app should be updated to look like the screenshot below.


Save changes by hitting Ctrl + S on the keyboard.

Configuring MySQL Server 2022 and connecting it to the Windows Forms App

Since our app needs to read and write the data of these students to and from a database server we have to create a Database called College and a Table called Students in that Database which will store the actual information captured from a student via the interface of the Windows Forms App.

SQL Server 2022 runs automatically when the device boots and we only need to connect to it from a Command Line Interface and run all queries to create the Databases and Tables.
In order to do that we need to follow the steps below religiously:

Open Command Prompt and type the following command to connect to SQL Server 2022 remotely.

sqlcmd -S localhost -E.

If the above command is successful then you should see the path on your Command Line Terminal replaced with the text >1 like in the screenshot shown below.

After you have connected to the Database Server then you need to run commands to create a new Database named College with the syntax below.

CREATE DATABASE College
GO

If the command is successful then you will see a screenshot similar to the one below.


Create a new Table named Students in the same College Database with the columns for student_id, student_fname, student_lname, student_phone, student_address, student_city and student_nationality with the syntax below.

USE College;
CREATE TABLE Student (
    student_id INT IDENTITY(1,1) PRIMARY KEY,
    first_name VARCHAR(50),
    last_name VARCHAR(50),
    phone VARCHAR(20),
    address VARCHAR(100),
    city VARCHAR(50),
    nationality VARCHAR(50)
);

After running the command above successfully then the terminal will show a new line for you to type in the next command like in the screenshot below.

Now go back to the Form Designer and double click on the Form and on a section on the form with no controls for example you could double click on the section with the red spot like in the screenshot below.


After you have clicked on the red spot shown in the screenshot above then the IDE will autogenerate a method that gets invoked when the form is loaded. The method signature takes after the method called **** on the screenshot below.


In that method we are going to write C# source code that connects to the SQL Server Database and shows a Message Box alert if the connection was successful.
Open the text file where you saved the connection string and copy the connection string by clicking Ctrl + C. If you didn't save the connection string to a text file then you can copy it from the screenshot below.


Copy the above connection string then double click on the Form to open the method handler for the Form's OnLoad event handler , migrate to the top of the class and add a definition called connectionString like shown in the screenshot below.


Scroll Down and place the cursor inside the method with the signature private void Form1_Load(object sender, EventArgs e){} and place the following code in it.

try
    {
        using (SqlConnection connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
        {
            connection.Open();
            MessageBox.Show("Connection successful!", "Success", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
        }
    }
    catch (Exception ex)
    {
        MessageBox.Show("Connection failed. Error message: " + ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
    }

After pasting the code you should see an output similar to the screenshot below where the type SqlConnection shows a compile time error.


To remove the error above, Hit the keyboard shortcut Ctrl + Enter and you should see an option named Install Package System.Data.SqlClient that corresponds the screenshot below.


From the screenshot above, choose Install Package System.Data.Client and then choose Find and Install The Latest version
which should find and install the System.Data.SqlClient into the project. This will get rid of the error so that the final state of the code in the Form is like in the screenshot below.

Debugging the Program

In order for us to test if the program is working as expected, we need to use the Debug Button to Run the program. You can always find the Debug option at the top of the window as a green rotated triangle pointing to the right and it's highlighted in the screenshot below.


Click on one of the two green triangles in the screen above to run the program and you should get an output similar to the screenshot below where the connection to SQL Server Database is successful.


The info in screenshot above shows that the program is now connected to SQL Server successfully.
Click on OK on the Message Dialog in the dialog above to clear it so that the form application is shown like in the screenshot below.


Close the Form and click the Form1.cs file in the Solution Explorer, Right Click on it and choose View Designer. The step is clearly highlighted in the screenshot below.


On the Designer double click on the Register Student button and the code for handling Click Events for this button should be generated in similar output to the screenshot below.

Validating User Input On the Form

Since the program requires the Textbox fields on the program to be filled, we need logic in the event handler of the button to check if the user tries to submit empty fields and prompt him/her to enter the correct values. For example the Student First Name field has some few rules like Name should not be less than three characters, Name should not contain Numbers or Special Characters, Name should not be empty. To achieve this we have the reference of the Textbox as textbox1, we add C# code into the button handler that will make sure those conditions are met. Sample code is shown below.

string input = textBox1.Text;
    if (input. Length < 3)
    {
        MessageBox.Show("The text must be at least 3 characters long.", "Invalid Input", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
        return;
    }
    else if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(input))
    {
        MessageBox.Show("The text cannot be empty.", "Invalid Input", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
        return;
    }
    else if (Regex.IsMatch(input, @"[^a-zA-Z0-9 ]"))
    {
        MessageBox.Show("The text contains special characters.", "Invalid Input", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
        return;
}

After pasting the code above in the button_1_Click event then my code looks like the screenshot attached below.

After updating the code, Run the program by clicking on the green run button and you should see that when you attempt to click on the Register Student button while the Textbox for Student First Name is empty then the program shows errors for the user to correct. Sample output is shown in the screenshots below.


You can define the validation rules for the other Textbox elements by changing the reference of the code above to include textBox1, textBox2 and so on and so forth. We are now going to insert our first student record into the database and to do that we will write a method that takes the input from the form as parameters and runs a query against the database and returns true if the operation was successful otherwise it will return false if there was a problem or an exception. The method code is highlighted below.

public bool InsertStudentRecord(string firstName, string lastName, string phone, string address, string city, string nationality)
        {
            string query = "INSERT INTO Student (first_name, last_name, phone, address, city, nationality) VALUES (@studentId, @firstName, @lastName, @phone, @address, @city, @nationality);";

            try
            {
                using (SqlConnection connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();
                    SqlCommand command = new SqlCommand(query, connection);
                    command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@firstName", firstName);
                    command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@lastName", lastName);
                    command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@phone", phone);
                    command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@address", address);
                    command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@city", city);
                    command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@nationality", nationality);
                    int result = command.ExecuteNonQuery();

                    if (result > 0)
                    {
                        return true;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        return false;
                    }
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message);
                return false;
            }
        }

Open the Form1.cs file and paste the method above into it so that the code file is updated to look something similar to the screenshot below.

Scroll to the method that handles the events for our Register Student button and use the method we pasted above in a conditional structure similar to the code highlighted below

private void button1_Click_1(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            string input = textBox1.Text;

            if (input.Length < 3)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("The text must be at least 3 characters long.", "Invalid Input", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
                return;
            }
            else if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(input))
            {
                MessageBox.Show("The text cannot be empty.", "Invalid Input", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
                return;
            }
            else if (Regex.IsMatch(input, @"[^a-zA-Z0-9 ]"))
            {
                MessageBox.Show("The text contains special characters.", "Invalid Input", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
                return;
            } 
            //Validation for other Input fields
            //if everything works as expected then get student details

            //get the first name of the student
            var fname = textBox1.Text;
            //get the last name of the student
            var lname = textBox2.Text;
            //get the contact of the student
            var phone = textBox3.Text;
            //get the address of the student
            var address = textBox4.Text;
            //get the city of the student
            var city = textBox5.Text;
            //get the nationality of the student
            var nation = textBox6.Text;
            if (InsertStudentRecord(fname, lname, phone, address, city, nation))
            {
                MessageBox.Show("Student record inserted successfully into the database");
            }
            else {
                MessageBox.Show("Insert operation failed, check exception for details");

            }
        }

Run the program and make sure you fill all the fields and then click on the Register Student button.
If you have done everything correctly then the program should be successful and will show an alert that the Student information was inserted into database successfully. See screenshot below for more details.


Now open the designer to view the Menu Strip items Retrieve, Edit and Delete. The opened designer will take after the screenshot below. Double Click on the Menu Strip item labeled Retrieve which is pointed at by an orange arrow.


After double clicking on the Retrieve menu strip item then the IDE will generate a method that will enable us to program the Click event for that particular menu strip. We need to program this menu strip item to accept a student ID from the user and returns a list of data about that student from database. The method is generated and shown in a similar fashion to the screenshot below.


We need to capture student_id information from the user so that we can use it to retrieve all the information about the student with that student_id from database , we will show an Input Dialog to prompt the user to enter the student ID using the code below. Paste the code below in the method shown in the screenshot above.

var studentID = Microsoft.VisualBasic.Interaction.InputBox("Please enter your student ID:", "Enter Student ID");
            //check if the user did not enter anything or a non number literal
            var empty = studentID == string.Empty;
            if (empty)
            {
                //user did not enter student ID, show a message box explainging why
                MessageBox.Show("The student ID is required to be able to retrieve information about that student");
                //do not execute further code
                return;
            }
            else
            {
                //check if the user did enter something but a non integer literal
                if(Int32.TryParse(studentID, out int result))
                {
                    //user entered the correct input
                    //get the integer and query for all the information for that student from database

                }
                else
                {
                    //user entered a an incorrect input
                    MessageBox.Show("You entered an incorrect integer literal");
                    return;
                }
            }

After pasting the above code in the retrieveToolStripMenuItem_Click method then the user is prompted to enter the student ID when he clicks on the item.

We will write another method that takes an integer argument as student ID, queries the database for all the information about that student and returns a List of data about that student. The method signature is shown in the screenshot below.

public List<string> GetStudentData(string studentId)
        {
            // Set up a connection to your database
            SqlConnection connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString);
            // Create a SQL query that selects all columns from a table called "students"
            // where the "id" column matches the specified studentId.
            string query = "SELECT * FROM student WHERE studet_id = @studentId";
            SqlCommand command = new SqlCommand(query, connection);
            command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@studentId", studentId);

            // Open the connection to the database and execute the query.
            connection.Open();
            SqlDataReader reader = command.ExecuteReader();

            // Read the data returned by the query and add each column's value to a list of strings.
            List<string> studentData = new List<string>();
            while (reader.Read())
            {
                studentData.Add(reader["id"].ToString());
                studentData.Add(reader["name"].ToString());
                studentData.Add(reader["age"].ToString());
                studentData.Add(reader["major"].ToString());
                // Add more columns here as needed.
            }

            // Close the reader and the connection to the database.
            reader.Close();
            connection.Close();

            // Return a tuple containing the student data list and the count of the list.
            return studentData;
        }

Paste the code in your Form1.cs file so that it is nested inside the class like shown in the screenshot below.

After pasting the code inside your class then update your retrieveToolStripMenuItem_Click handler to look like below.

private void retrieveToolStripMenuItem_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            var studentID = Microsoft.VisualBasic.Interaction.InputBox("Please enter your student ID:", "Enter Student ID");
            //check if the user did not enter anything or a non number literal
            var empty = studentID == string.Empty;
            if (empty)
            {
                //user did not enter student ID, show a message box explainging why
                MessageBox.Show("The student ID is required to be able to retrieve information about that student");
                //do not execute further code
                return;
            }
            else
            {
                //check if the user did enter something but a non integer literal
                if(Int32.TryParse(studentID, out int result))
                {
                    //user entered the correct input
                    //get the integer and query for all the information for that student from database\
                    var data = GetStudentData(studentID);
                    if (data.Count == 0)
                    {
                        //no student was found with that ID
                        MessageBox.Show("No student with such ID exists in the database");
                        return;
                    }
                    if(data.Count >0)
                    {
                        //build a student info string
                        var info = "Names: " + data[0] + " " + data[1] + "\n" +
                            "Phone: " + data[2] + "\n" +
                            "Address: " + data[3] + "\n" +
                            "City: " + data[4] + "\n" + "\n" +
                            "Nationality: " + data[5];
                        MessageBox.Show(info,"Student Found");
                    }
                }
                else
                {
                    //user entered a an incorrect input
                    MessageBox.Show("You entered an incorrect integer literal");
                    return;
                }
            }
        }

Run the program, click on Retrieve and pass 1 as the studentID parameter and click OK to view information about the student with that ID.


If you inserted a student record into the database then this operation should be successful and you should see a message box with the student information similar to the screenshot below.


Open the Designer by clicking on the file Form1.cs[Design]*. **Double Click the Edit menu strip item at the top of the window, the menu strip item to double click is pointed at with the orange arrow in the screenshot below.


After double clicking on the menu strip above you should be able to see a method that has been generated by the IDE for handling the click events made on the Edit menu strip item. The method should be similar to the screenshot below.

We will place code in that method that will also require the student ID parameter from the user and then shows input dialog with the title for each property of that record that the user intends to edit. The code is highlighted in the code section below.

    //display an input dialog for the student ID the user would like to edit
            var studentID = Microsoft.VisualBasic.Interaction.InputBox("Please enter the  student ID you want to edit:", "Enter Student ID");
            //cegck if the input is empty
            var empty = studentID == string.Empty;
            if (empty)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("You have to enter the ID of the student you would like to edit", "Student ID error");
                //do not execute further code
                return;
            }
            else
            {
                //if not empty try and parse an integer literal out of the string
                if(Int32.TryParse(studentID,out var b))
                {
                    //integer parsed legal
                    //check if such a record exists in the database
                    //if true show the input dialog to capture the new values for the student object
                }
                else
                {
                    //integer parsed is illegal
                    MessageBox.Show("The integer literal you entered is invalid");
                }
            }

Paste the code above in the editToolStripMenuItem_Click method in the Form1.cs file. After that we need to define a Boolean method that will check if a row with the student ID specified for editing purposes exists in the database table then we show a message box if a record is found and show fields for the user to edit the record if the record is found. Code section is shown below.

public bool CheckIfRecordExists(string studentId)
        {
            bool recordExists = false;
            using (SqlConnection connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
            {
                string query = "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Student WHERE student_id = @studentId";
                SqlCommand command = new SqlCommand(query, connection);
                command.Parameters.AddWithValue("@studentId", studentId);
                connection.Open();
                int count = (int)command.ExecuteScalar();
                if (count > 0)
                {
                    recordExists = true;
                }
                else
                {
                }
            }
            return recordExists;
        }

Paste the code above in the method level of your Form1.cs file. After pasting the method above you should see the file updated to be similar to the output below.

Use the method above in the editToolStripMenuItem_Click method and to check if there is an existing database table entry associated with that student ID or not. Here is a screenshot showing how to use the method to check for the record.


Run the program, find the Edit menu strip command and click on it, immediately you should be prompted for a student ID parameter entry via an Input Dialog message box as shown in the screenshot below.


Pass a sample student ID parameter, in this case I passed the parameter 1 and clicked on OK. You will see a prompt to edit the first name of the student with the ID you just passed.
I will type the name Williams to update the first name of the record with the student ID 1, I will then click OK and wait for the program to show the message that the Update operation was successful. The screenshot below shows the value I entered for updating the first name of the entry with the student ID parameter 1.

Antidisestablishmentarianism - Jan 18

Rasheed K Mozaffar - Jan 17

Antidisestablishmentarianism - Jan 17

Once unsuspended, timcsharp will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by timcsharp will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If timcsharp is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

item.author: timcsharp

item.title: Zabbix 6.X LDAP 集成 | Zabbix 6.X LDAP Entegrasyonu
item.description:
伊斯莱姆塔玛姆 :)

不是：Zabbix 服务器 kurulu olan makina üzerinden LDAP hostuna 389 veya 636 portları üzerinden ulaşamıyorsanız iç ve dış firewall izilerinizi ev özellikle RPM tabanlı sistemlerde Selinux'u kontrol etmeyi unutmayın。

相关代码 - 2 月 23 日

一旦暂停，aciklab 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

一旦解除暂停，aciklab 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，aciklab 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 aciklab 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 aciklab：

降低 aciklab 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 aciklab 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Zabbix ürününün LDAP otantikasyon özelliği bulunmakta, bu özelliği kullanmak için Administration sekmesine yetkili bir kullanıcı ile Zabbix arayüzüne giriş yapabilmemiz gerekmektedir.

1- Admin bir kullanıcı ile Zabbix arayüzüne giriş yapıyoruz.

2- Sağ tarafta açılan pencerelerden Adminisration altında bulunan Authentication sekmesine tıklıyoruz.

3- Sağ tarafta açılan alandan LDAP Setting tabınına tıklıyoruz.

4- Enable LDAP authentication alanını seçiyoruz

5- İlgili alanları dolduruyoruz

Bu alanları doldururken SSL kullanan iletişim isteniyorsa Port alanı 636 ve LDAP host alanının urli de ldaps olarak güncellenmelidir.

6- Test alanını bir LDAP kullanıcısının bilgilerini giriyoruz ve Test butonuna basarak kontrol ediyoruz.

7- Yukarıdaki gibi başarılı sonuç aldıysak Update butonuna basarak ayarı kayıt ediyoruz.

8- Açılan Authentication tabından Default authenticationu istersek LDAP olarka güncelleyebiliriz.

İşlem tamam :)

Not: Zabbix server kurulu olan makina üzerinden LDAP hostuna 389 veya 636 portları üzerinden ulaşamıyorsanız iç ve dış firewall izilerinizi ev özellikle RPM tabanlı sistemlerde Selinux'u kontrol etmeyi unutmayın.

Code of Relevancy - Feb 23

item.title: usState什么时候用？ | usState when to use?
item.description:
戈兰穆斯塔法

发表于 3 月 22 日

这些只是 useState 挂钩的许多用例中的几个示例。 一旦暂停，golam_mostafa 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，golam_mostafa 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，golam_mostafa 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 golam_mostafa 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 golam_mostafa：

降低 golam_mostafa 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 golam_mostafa 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Golam_Mostafa

Posted on Mar 22

   

1. Managing simple state:

import React, { useState } from 'react';

function Example() {
  const [count, setCount] = useState(0);

  return (
    <div>
      <p>You clicked {count} times</p>
      <button onClick={() => setCount(count + 1)}>Click me</button>
    </div>
  );
}

2. Managing boolean state:

import React, { useState } from 'react';

function Example() {
  const [isOn, setIsOn] = useState(false);

  return (
    <div>
      <p>The light is {isOn ? 'on' : 'off'}</p>
      <button onClick={() => setIsOn(!isOn)}>
        {isOn ? 'Turn off' : 'Turn on'}
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}

3. Managing complex state:

import React, { useState } from 'react';

function Example() {
  const [person, setPerson] = useState({ name: '', age: 0 });

  const handleInputChange = event => {
    const { name, value } = event.target;
    setPerson({ ...person, [name]: value });
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <p>Name: {person.name}</p>
      <p>Age: {person.age}</p>
      <input
        type="text"
        name="name"
        value={person.name}
        onChange={handleInputChange}
      />
      <input
        type="number"
        name="age"
        value={person.age}
        onChange={handleInputChange}
      />
    </div>
  );
}

4. Managing array state:

import React, { useState } from 'react';

function Example() {
  const [todos, setTodos] = useState([]);

  const handleAddTodo = () => {
    setTodos([...todos, { id: Date.now(), text: 'New todo' }]);
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <ul>
        {todos.map(todo => (
          <li key={todo.id}>{todo.text}</li>
        ))}
      </ul>
      <button onClick={handleAddTodo}>Add todo</button>
    </div>
  );
}

5. Updating state based on previous state:

import React, { useState } from 'react';

function Example() {
  const [count, setCount] = useState(0);

  const handleIncrement = () => {
    setCount(prevCount => prevCount + 1);
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <p>You clicked {count} times</p>
      <button onClick={handleIncrement}>Click me</button>
    </div>
  );
}

These are just a few examples of the many use cases of the useState hook. The hook is very versatile and can be used to manage any kind of state within a React component.

item.title: 预加载谷歌字体 | Preloading Google Fonts
item.description:
皮克罗在纸上

发表于 3 月 22 日

选择你的字体，添加几行代码，然后砰的一声，你就完成了：

 <head> <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" crossorigin /> <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin /> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" /> </head>

好吧，直到您意识到您的字体不会立即应用，只有在整个页面加载后才会应用。 这提高了页面速度，但不是最好的设计明智（并且在某种程度上，UX 明智）。

我们可以使用rel="preload"告诉浏览器在加载之前加载资源：

 <head> <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" crossorigin /> <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin /> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto&display=swap" rel="preload" as="style" crossorigin /> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" /> </head>

确保添加两个<link/>标签。

但这还没有解决我们的问题。 我们正在预加载样式表，但该样式表还导入字体。 我们也必须预加载那些。

如果您访问https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto&display=swap （样式表位置），您将看到一个字体声明列表：

 /* latin */ @font-face { font-family: 'Roboto'; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; font-display: swap; src: url(https://fonts.gstatic.com/s/roboto/v30/KFOmCnqEu92Fr1Mu4mxKKTU1Kg.woff2) format('woff2'); unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+2000-206F, U+2074, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD; }

您只需为带有/* latin */或/* latin-ext */注释的@font-face执行此操作，因为这些是英文字母表的字体文件。

这不会是完美的，但它应该在 95% 的时间内工作。

干杯!

一旦暂停，pilcrowonpaper 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

解除暂停后，pilcrowonpaper 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，pilcrowonpaper 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 pilcrowonpaper 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 pilcrowonpaper 的方法：

使 pilcrowonpaper 的所有帖子不那么显眼

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 pilcrowonpaper 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

pilcrowOnPaper

Posted on Mar 22

Google Fonts is one of the easiest way to customize your website. Pick your fonts, add few lines of code, and boom, you're done:

<head> <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" crossorigin /> <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin /> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
</head>

Well, until you realize that your fonts aren't getting applied immediately, only getting so after the whole page has loaded. That improves page speed but isn't the best design wise (and to some extent, UX wise).

We can tell the browser to load assets before load with rel="preload":

<head> <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" crossorigin /> <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin /> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto&display=swap" rel="preload" as="style" crossorigin /> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
</head>

Make sure to add both of the <link/> tag.

But this doesn't solve our problem just yet. We're preloading a stylesheet, but that stylesheet also imports fonts. We have to preload those as well.

If you visit https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto&display=swap (the stylesheet location), you'll see a list of font-face declaration:

/* latin */
@font-face { font-family: 'Roboto'; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; font-display: swap; src: url(https://fonts.gstatic.com/s/roboto/v30/KFOmCnqEu92Fr1Mu4mxKKTU1Kg.woff2) format('woff2'); unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+2000-206F, U+2074, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;
}

That url inside url(https://fonts.gstatic.com/s/roboto/v30/KFOmCnqEu92Fr1Mu4mxKKTU1Kg.woff2) is the actual font and we can preload those as well:

<head> <!-- previous stuff --> <link rel="preload" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com/s/roboto/v30/KFOmCnqEu92Fr1Mu4mxKKTU1Kg.woff2" crossorigin as="font" type="font/woff2" />
</head>

You only have to do this for @font-face with a /* latin */ or /* latin-ext */ comment since those are the font files for the English alphabet.

This won't be perfect but it should work 95% of the time.

Cheers!

item.title: Laravel 数组助手 | Laravel Array Helpers
item.description:
莫科斯盖德

发表于 3 月 22 日

我在浏览 laravel 新闻博客时发现了一篇非常好的文章，讲的是每个开发人员都应该知道的 Laravel Array Helpers。 我知道它们，但很高兴与您分享它们，因为我知道这个阵列的重要性

use Illuminate\Support\Arr; $stack = ['Tailwind', 'Alpine', 'Laravel', 'Livewire']; Arr::join($stack, ', '); // Tailwind, Alpine, Laravel, Livewire implode($stack, ', '); // Tailwind, Alpine, Laravel, Livewire $stack_2 = ['Tailwind', 'Alpine', 'Laravel', 'Livewire']; Arr::join($stack_2, ', ', ', and'); // Tailwind, Alpine, Laravel, and Livewire
 $array = [ ['product_id' => 'prod-100', 'name' => 'Desk'], ['product_id' => 'prod-200', 'name' => 'Chair'], ]; $keyed = []; foreach ($array as $value) { $keyed[$value['product_id']] = $value; } /* [ 'prod-100' => ['product_id' => 'prod-100', 'name' => 'Desk'], 'prod-200' => ['product_id' => 'prod-200', 'name' => 'Chair'], ] */ // Using the Arr::keyBy() method, you can do the same thing with one line of code $keyed = Arr::keyBy($array, 'product_id');
  • 检查和获取数组中的数据
use Illuminate\Support\Arr; $data = [ 'products' => [ 'desk' => [ 'name' => 'Oakendesk' 'price' => 599.00, 'description' => 'Solid oak desk built from scratch.' ], ], ]; // 599.00 Arr::get($data, 'products.desk.price'); // Returns false Arr::has($data, 'products.desk.discount'); // Returns null Arr::get($data, 'products.desk.discount'); // Returns custom default value if not found. Arr::get($data, 'products.desk.discount', ['type' => 'percent', 'value' => 10]);
  • 获取数组中的第一个或最后一个元素
// end() $array = [100, 200, 300, 110]; end($array); // If your array is empty, though, you will get false instead $array = []; end($array); // false // Using Laravel's last() helper, you have multiple options when an array is empty use Illuminate\Support\Arr; $array = []; Arr::last($array); // null // Provide a default Arr::last($array, null, 100); // 100 // Using Laravel's helper also enables you to pass a closure as a second argument as the condition for which element to return first or last respectively $array = [100, 200, 300, 110]; Arr::last($array, fn ($e) => $e > 110); // 300 Arr::first($array, fn ($e) => $e > 110); // 200
  • 从数组中提取数据
$array = [ ['user' => ['id' => 1, 'name' => 'User 1', 'email' => 'user1@example.com']], ['user' => ['id' => 2, 'name' => 'User 2', 'email' => 'user2@example.com']], ]; $emails = []; foreach ($array as $result) { $emails[] = $result['user']['email']; } /* [ "user1@example.com", "user2@example.com", ] */ // Laravel's Arr::pluck() helper makes this trivial Arr::pluck($array, 'user.email');

我给了你，简而言之，平台中提到的内容，但你必须访问文章

并越来越深入以充分利用。

一旦取消发布，morcosgad 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 morcosgad 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 Morcosgad：

降低 morcosgad 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 morcosgad 将​​恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Morcos Gad

Posted on Mar 22

I found a very good article when browsing the laravel news blog that talks about Laravel Array Helpers, which every developer should know. I know about them, but it's great to share them with you because I know the importance of this Array

use Illuminate\Support\Arr; $stack = ['Tailwind', 'Alpine', 'Laravel', 'Livewire']; Arr::join($stack, ', ');
// Tailwind, Alpine, Laravel, Livewire implode($stack, ', ');
// Tailwind, Alpine, Laravel, Livewire $stack_2 = ['Tailwind', 'Alpine', 'Laravel', 'Livewire']; Arr::join($stack_2, ', ', ', and');
// Tailwind, Alpine, Laravel, and Livewire

 $array = [ ['product_id' => 'prod-100', 'name' => 'Desk'], ['product_id' => 'prod-200', 'name' => 'Chair'],
]; $keyed = []; foreach ($array as $value) { $keyed[$value['product_id']] = $value;
} /* [ 'prod-100' => ['product_id' => 'prod-100', 'name' => 'Desk'], 'prod-200' => ['product_id' => 'prod-200', 'name' => 'Chair'], ]
*/ // Using the Arr::keyBy() method, you can do the same thing with one line of code $keyed = Arr::keyBy($array, 'product_id');
  • Checking and Getting Data from an Array 
use Illuminate\Support\Arr; $data = [ 'products' => [ 'desk' => [ 'name' => 'Oakendesk' 'price' => 599.00, 'description' => 'Solid oak desk built from scratch.' ], ],
]; // 599.00
Arr::get($data, 'products.desk.price'); // Returns false
Arr::has($data, 'products.desk.discount'); // Returns null
Arr::get($data, 'products.desk.discount'); // Returns custom default value if not found.
Arr::get($data, 'products.desk.discount', ['type' => 'percent', 'value' => 10]);
  • Getting the first or last element in an array 
// end()
$array = [100, 200, 300, 110];
end($array); // If your array is empty, though, you will get false instead
$array = [];
end($array); // false // Using Laravel's last() helper, you have multiple options when an array is empty
use Illuminate\Support\Arr; $array = []; Arr::last($array); // null // Provide a default
Arr::last($array, null, 100); // 100 // Using Laravel's helper also enables you to pass a closure as a second argument as the condition for which element to return first or last respectively
$array = [100, 200, 300, 110]; Arr::last($array, fn ($e) => $e > 110); // 300
Arr::first($array, fn ($e) => $e > 110); // 200
  • Plucking Data from an Array 
$array = [ ['user' => ['id' => 1, 'name' => 'User 1', 'email' => 'user1@example.com']], ['user' => ['id' => 2, 'name' => 'User 2', 'email' => 'user2@example.com']],
]; $emails = []; foreach ($array as $result) { $emails[] = $result['user']['email'];
} /*
[ "user1@example.com", "user2@example.com",
]
*/ // Laravel's Arr::pluck() helper makes this trivial
Arr::pluck($array, 'user.email');

I gave you, in short, what was mentioned in the platform, but you must visit the article

and go deeper and deeper to take full advantage.

item.title: 是时候重命名无服务器了 | It's time to rename serverless
item.description:
这是一篇简短的文章。

沃德利映射理论讨论了事物如何在进化过程中获得新的意义。

  • 云在 2023 年的意义与 2010 年不同
  • 平台在 2023 年与 2000 年的意义不同
  • 所以让我回到一些基础知识。

    什么是云？

    云的概念最初是基于标准构建并通过网络分发给用户的工业化、可互操作和商品化的基础设施服务。 今天，云的概念扩展了这个定义，包括由服务、功能和原则组成的系统的概念，这些服务、功能和原则可以协调工作，让用户能够正确地构建事物。 根据这个定义，云平台的价值主张是关于满足业务领先目标，例如开发速度、可靠性、安全性、敏捷性和效率。

    基础设施服务：这些服务和功能的集合基本上是作为服务提供的虚拟机。 示例：亚马逊 EC2

  • 运行时服务：这个服务和功能的集合是作为服务提供的运行时。 示例：AWS Lambda。

  • 应用程序服务：此服务和功能的集合是作为服务提供的应用程序。 示例：Salesforce CRM。

问题是，到 2023 年，您无需拥有数据中心并将基础设施作为按使用付费服务进行分发即可成为云提供商：

  • 什么是内容？

    内容是平台用户拥有并放入平台以构建合适的东西的集合。 换句话说，内容由用户在平台上拥有的内容定义。

    我们根据服务提供不同类型的内容：

    • 对于基础设施服务：用户拥有运行时、代码和数据。

    • 对于运行时服务：用户拥有代码和数据。

    • 对于应用服务：用户只拥有数据。

    那么什么是无服务器？

    得益于 Google AppEngine 和 AWS Lambda 的服务，无服务器的概念始于按需功能。 今天，我们可以找到复杂的定义，其中包括函数即服务和后端即服务的组合，特别是自从引入无服务器容器以来。 对我来说，无服务器的概念在 2023 年演变为运行时即服务，可扩展到零，用户拥有代码和数据。 就这么简单。

    所以，当我看到一项新服务时，我会问自己两个问题：

    • 我拥有什么？
    • 它是如何扩展的？

    根据这两个问题的答案，我在心里对我正在使用的平台类型进行分类。 当我拥有代码和数据并且服务规模为零时，我知道我正在使用运行时即服务，并且我意识到我的职责，包括我负责升级和维护的内容！ 有些人称之为无服务器🫠

塞巴斯蒂安拿破仑 - 3 月 6 日

一旦暂停，peibolsang 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，peibolsang 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，peibolsang 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 peibolsang 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 peibolsang 的方法：

降低 peibolsang 发布的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 peibolsang 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

This is a short post.

The theory of Wardley mapping talks about how things get a new meaning as they evolve.

  • DevOps does not mean the same in 2023 as in 2013
  • Cloud does not mean the same in 2023 as in 2010
  • Platform does not mean the same in 2023 as in 2000
  • Serverless does not mean the same in 2023 as in 2016

So let me go back to some basics.

What is the cloud?

The concept of the cloud started as industrialized, interoperable, and commoditized infrastructure services built on standards and distributed over the wire to users. Today, the concept of cloud expanded this definition to include the idea of a system made of services, features, and principles that work in harmony to allow users to build the thing right. With this definition, the value proposition of cloud platforms is about meeting business leading goals such as speed of development, reliability, security, agility, and efficiency.

In 2023, we have three different levels of services offered by cloud platforms:

  • Infrastructure services: this collection of services and features are basically VMs offered as a service. Example: Amazon EC2

  • Runtime services: this collection of services and features are runtimes offered as a service. Example: AWS Lambda.

  • Application services: this collection of services and features are applications offered as a service. Example: Salesforce CRM.

The thing is that, in 2023, you don't need to own a data center and distribute infrastructure as pay-per-use services to be a cloud provider:

  • Fly.io is a cloud provider of infrastructure services
  • Vercel and Supabase are cloud providers for runtime services
  • Atlassian is a cloud provider of application services

What is content?

Content is the collection of things that platform users own and put in the platform to build the right thing. Content's value proposition is about meetings meeting business lagging goals such as growth, revenue, and customer satisfaction. In other words, content is defined by what the user owns on the platform.

We have different types of content depending on the services:

  • For infrastructure services: the user owns the runtimes, code, and data.

  • For runtime services: the user owns the code and data.

  • For application services: the user only owns the data.

What is serverless, then?

The concept of serverless started as on-demand functions thanks to services to Google AppEngine and AWS Lambda. Today, we can find complex definitions that include a combination of Functions as a Service and Backend as a Service, especially since the introduction of serverless containers. To me, the concept of serverless in 2023 evolved to runtimes as a service that scale to zero where users own the code and the data. It is that simple.

So, the moment I see a new service out there, I ask myself two questions:

  • What do I own?
  • How does it scale?

Depending on the answer to these two questions, I mentally categorize the type of platform I am working with. The moment I own code and data and the service scales to zero, I know I am using Runtime as a Service, and I am conscious of my duties, including what I am responsible for upgrading and maintaining! Some people call this serverless 🫠

Sebastien Napoleon - Mar 6

item.description:
穆斯塔法_A

发表于 3 月 22 日

莫恩莫恩，

慕达发

原文:

Mustafa_A

Posted on Mar 22

Moin Moin,

Empfehlungen für die eigene Karriere ( berufliches Vorwärtskommen ). Falls du welche suchst oder auch welche geben möchtest bist du hier richtig.
Stellen wir uns folgendes vor:

Angenommen ein guter Freund von dir, ein Software-Entwickler, möchte sich beruflich Weiterentwickeln. Welche Ratschläge würdest du ihm geben ?

Meine Empfehlung wäre Fortbildung, Fortbildung, Fortbildung. Das ist zumindest das Erste was mir einfällt. Die Stärken weiter ausbauen. Den eigenen Interessen nachgehen.
Das Zweite, was jedoch der Fortbildung eine Richtung gibt:

Warum bist du Software-Entwickler geworden ?

Was treibt dich an, was ist dein „warum“.
Sobald das klar ist, ist auch klar was der nächste Schritt ist.

Beste Grüße,
Mustafa

Elyse Y. Robinson - Feb 12

Vincent A. Cicirello - Feb 2

item.title: 快速访问修饰符 | Swift Access Modifiers
item.description:
访问修饰符是让我们控制类/结构/变量或方法的访问级别的标识符。

在 swift 中有以下访问修饰符 -
如果不提及任何内容，那么这是类/结构等获得的默认访问类型。
在这一实体中，可以在目标内访问和继承实体。

Access level - accessible & inheritable within target

示例 - 在下面的屏幕截图中，属性osName由于私有访问而无法访问。

示例 1 - 在下面的屏幕截图中，可以在其类范围之外访问属性osName ，因为这些类是在同一文件中创建的。

示例 2 - 在下面的屏幕截图中，属性osName不可访问，因为访问它的类不在创建 osName 的同一文件中。 因此，导致错误。

目标 1 -> 类ViewController
目标 2 > 类NRDropDownHelper

因此，导致错误。

将类访问权限更改为 public 后

  1. 它可以在 ViewController 中访问
  2. 然而不能在目标之外继承因此导致错误。

有了这个实体也可以在外部目标中访问和继承。

Access level - accessible and inheritable in other targets as well

示例类NRDropDownHelper是访问类，也是在类customHelper中继承的。



原文:

Access modifiers are the identifiers which let us control the access level of class/struct/variable or methods.

In swift there are following Access Modifiers -
1. internal - This is the default one. When don't mention any then this is the default type of access the class/struct etc get.
In this one entities can be access and inherited within the target.

Access level - accessible & inheritable within target

2. private - With this one entities are only accessible within class scope and, when accessed out of class then will give error.

Access level - within enclosing declaration

Example - In below screenshot , the property osName is inaccessible due to private access.

3. fileprivate - Just as the name explains, the entities are accessible within enclosing declaration and within same file i.e in which it is declared.

Access level - within enclosing declaration & within same file

Example 1 - In below screenshot, the property osName is accessible out of its class scope because those classes are created in same file.

Example 2 - In below screenshot, the property osName is inaccessible because the class accessing it is not in the same file in which osName was created. Hence, causes error.

4. public - This makes the entity accessible among other targets also however, they can't be inherited in the other targets.

Access level - accessible in other targets but not inheritable out of self target

_Example 1 - _
Target 1 -> class ViewController
Target 2 > class NRDropDownHelper

NRDropDownHelper is inaccessible in Target 1 (ViewController class) due to it's default internal level. Hence, causes error.

_Example 2 - _

After changing the class access to public

  1. It becomes accessible in ViewController
  2. Yet can't be inherited outside target hence causes error.

5. open - This is the highest level of access in swift. With this entities are accessible and inheritable in outside target as well.

Access level - accessible and inheritable in other targets as well

example class NRDropDownHelper is access and is also inherited in class customHelper.

item.title: 英国论文写作服务 | Thesis Writing Services United Kingdom
item.description:
英国论文写作服务是那些发现论文助手撰写论文是一项艰巨且耗时的任务的学生的理想解决方案。 这些服务通常通过将学生与可以帮助他们满足写作需求的专业作家相匹配来发挥作用。 然后，写作服务会将订单分配给合格的作家，后者将撰写论文并在商定的截止日期前将其交付给学生。

这些服务可以很好地缓解与撰写论文相关的压力和焦虑，但在下订单之前确保您使用的是信誉良好的写作服务非常重要。 选择论文写作服务时，您应该考虑的一些关键因素是位置、可靠性和客户支持。

英国最好的论文写作服务应该能够以最实惠的价格提供一系列写作服务。 他们还应该有一个作家团队，他们是各自领域的专家，可以为所有学术水平的学生提供高质量的论文。

除了撰写论文外，他们还应该能够为客户提供硕士论文帮助编辑服务。 这意味着他们将通读完成的文档，以确保一切正确且语法合理。

论文写作服务还应提供每周 7 天、每天 24 小时的客户支持，以回答客户可能遇到的任何护理论文写作服务问题或疑虑。 这对于确保客户对他们的服务感到满意并且对最终产品感到满意至关重要。

这将确保客户在需要时始终能够获得帮助。 此外，如果客户对他们的工作不满意，这些服务应该能够为客户提供退款保证。

确保您获得优质服务的最佳方法是阅读营销论文撰写评论。 这些评论可以在许多不同的网站上找到，可以让您清楚地了解每项服务的质量和体验。

这些评论将使您了解论文写作服务是否可靠，以及他们是否有专家团队能够以可承受的价格提供高质量的论文。 您将能够在这些网站上找到所有主要的英国论文写作服务的评论，以便您可以选择最适合您需要的服务。

除了评论之外，在下订单之前进行自己的研究也是个好主意。 您应该能够查看该公司的网站，阅读他们的条款和条件，并与他们联系以确保他们是一家合法企业。

您还应该确保公司位于英国，以避免诈骗。 如果论文写作服务不在英国，那么它们很可能不是可靠的服务，您应该考虑寻找其他地方。



原文:

Thesis writing services uk are an ideal solution for those students who find dissertation helpers writing their thesis a daunting and time-consuming task. These services typically work by matching students with professional writers who can help them with their writing needs. The writing service will then assign an order to a qualified writer who will then work on the dissertation and deliver it to the student by the agreed-upon deadline.

These services can be a great way to alleviate the stress and anxiety buy dissertation help associated with writing a dissertation, but it is very important to ensure that you are working with a reputable writing service before placing an order. Some of the key factors that you should be considering when choosing a dissertation writing service are location, reliability, and customer support.

The best thesis writing services in the UK should be able to provide a range of writing services at an best dissertation editing services affordable price. They should also have a team of writers who are experts in their field and can provide high-quality dissertations for students of all academic levels.

In addition to writing dissertations, they should also be able to provide masters dissertation help editing services to their clients. This means that they will read through the finished document to ensure that everything is correct and grammatically sound.

A thesis writing service should also have customer support that is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week to answer any nursing dissertation writing services questions or concerns that the client may have. This is crucial to making sure that the client is happy with their service and that they are satisfied with the final product.

This will ensure that the client is always able to get help when they need it. Additionally, these services should be able to provide clients with a money-back guarantee if they are not satisfied with their work.

The best way to make sure that you are getting a good quality service is to read marketing dissertation writing reviews. These reviews can be found on many different websites and will give you a clear picture of the quality and experience of each service.

These reviews will allow you to see if the dissertation writing service is reliable and if they have a team of experts who can provide quality essays at an affordable price. You will be able to find reviews of all the major UK-based dissertation writing services on these websites so that you can choose the one that best suits your needs.

In addition to reviews, it is a good idea to conduct your own research before placing an order. You should dissertation proposal writing services be able to check out the company’s website, read their terms and conditions, and contact them to ensure that they are a legitimate business.

You should also ensure that the company is located in the UK to avoid scams. If a dissertation writing service is not located in the UK, then it’s likely that they are not a credible service and you should consider looking elsewhere.
